parameters.query:
UPDATE users SET
  height     = {{ $json.height }},
  weight     = {{ $json.weight }},
  goal       = '{{ $json.goalText }}',
  injuries   = '{{ $json.injuries }}'::jsonb,
  equipment  = '{{ $json.equipment }}'::jsonb
WHERE email = '{{ $json.email }}'
RETURNING 
  email, name, goal,
  height, weight,
  injuries, equipment

SELECT 
  id, email, name, goal, 
  height,
  weight,
  injuries, equipment,
  experience, body_type,
  training_location
FROM users 
WHERE email = '{{ $json.email }}'
LIMIT 1

parameters.jsCode:
const body = $json.body || $json;
return { json: { email: body.email } };

parameters.content: чурка, у меня в main экране есть вебхук это запрос на ветку для главного жкр

parameters.query:
UPDATE workouts
SET 
  exercises = '{{ JSON.stringify($json.adapted_workout) }}'::jsonb,
  status = 'adapted',
  updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
WHERE id = {{ $('GetCurrentWorkoutForAdapt').first().json.id }}
  AND user_id = {{ $json.user_id || 1 }}
RETURNING *

SELECT * FROM workouts
WHERE user_id = {{ $json.user_id || 1 }}
  AND status IN ('pending', 'adapted') -- Разрешаем брать и уже адаптированные
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT 1

INSERT INTO activities (
  user_id,
  exercise_name,
  duration_seconds,
  calories,
  notes
) VALUES (
  {{ $json.user_id || 1 }},
  'Daily Activity',
  {{ $json.active_minutes * 60 }},
  {{ $json.active_calories }},
  'Steps: {{ $json.steps }}, Lifestyle: {{ $json.lifestyle_state }}'
)
RETURNING *

SELECT 
  COALESCE(SUM(amount_ml), 0) as total_ml,
  COALESCE(SUM(amount_ml)/1000.0, 0) as total_liters,
  COUNT(*) as logs_count
FROM water_logs
WHERE user_id = {{ $json.user_id }}
  AND log_date = CURRENT_DATE

INSERT INTO water_logs (
  user_id,
  amount_ml,
  log_date
) VALUES (
  {{ $json.user_id || 1 }},
  {{ $json.amount_ml }},
  '{{ $json.date }}'
)
RETURNING *

INSERT INTO sleep_logs (
  user_id, 
  hours, 
  quality, 
  log_date,
  notes
) VALUES (
  {{ $json.user_id || 1 }},
  {{ $json.actual_hours }},
  '{{ $json.state }}',
  '{{ $json.date }}',
  'Quality score: {{ $json.quality_score }}, CNS recovery: {{ $json.cns_recovery_score }}'
)
RETURNING *

SELECT 
  '{{ $json.period }}' as period,
  '{{ $json.date }}' as req_date,
  COALESCE(SUM(n.calories), 0) as total_calories,
  COALESCE(AVG(n.calories), 0) as avg_calories_per_meal,
  COUNT(n.id) as total_meals,
  COALESCE(SUM(w.amount_ml), 0) as total_water_ml,
  COALESCE(AVG(w.amount_ml), 0) as avg_water_ml,
  COUNT(w.id) as total_water_logs
FROM 
  (SELECT id as uid FROM users WHERE email = '{{ $json.email }}') u
LEFT JOIN nutrition_logs n ON n.user_id = u.uid 
  AND (
    ('{{ $json.period }}' = 'day' AND n.log_date::date = '{{ $json.date }}'::date)
    OR
    ('{{ $json.period }}' != 'day' AND n.log_date::date >= (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 month'))
  )
LEFT JOIN water_logs w ON w.user_id = u.uid 
  AND (
    ('{{ $json.period }}' = 'day' AND w.log_date::date = '{{ $json.date }}'::date)
    OR
    ('{{ $json.period }}' != 'day' AND w.log_date::date >= (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 month'))
  )

SELECT 
  '{{ $json.period }}' as period,
  '{{ $json.date }}' as req_date,
  COUNT(*) as total_logs,
  COALESCE(AVG(hours), 0) as avg_hours,
  COALESCE(SUM(hours), 0) as total_hours
FROM sleep_logs
WHERE user_id = (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = '{{ $json.email }}')
  AND (
    ('{{ $json.period }}' = 'day' AND log_date::date = '{{ $json.date }}'::date)
    OR
    ('{{ $json.period }}' != 'day' AND log_date::date >= (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 month'))
  )

SELECT 
  '{{ $json.period }}' as period,
  '{{ $json.date }}' as req_date,
  COUNT(*) as total_workouts,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'completed' THEN 1 END) as completed_workouts,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'pending' THEN 1 END) as pending_workouts,
  COALESCE(AVG(duration_minutes), 0) as avg_duration,
  COALESCE(SUM(duration_minutes), 0) as total_minutes
FROM workouts
WHERE user_id = (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = '{{ $json.email }}')
  AND (
    ('{{ $json.period }}' = 'day' AND created_at::date = '{{ $json.date }}'::date)
    OR
    ('{{ $json.period }}' != 'day' AND created_at::date >= (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 month'))
  )

INSERT INTO chat_history (user_id, role, message) 
VALUES (
  {{ $json.userId }}, 
  'assistant', 
  '{{ $json.aiResponse }}'
)
RETURNING *

SELECT 
  name, 
  goal, 
  experience, 
  injuries, 
  equipment 
FROM users 
WHERE id = {{ $json.user_id }} 
LIMIT 1

INSERT INTO chat_history (user_id, role, message) 
VALUES (
  {{ $json.user_id }}, 
  'user', 
  '{{ $json.message }}'
)
RETURNING *

SELECT role, message, created_at 
FROM chat_history 
WHERE user_id = {{ $json.user_id }} 
ORDER BY created_at DESC 
LIMIT 20
SELECT * FROM users WHERE email = '{{ $json.email }}' LIMIT 1

INSERT INTO nutrition_logs (
  meal_name,
  calories,
  protein,
  fats,
  carbs,
  log_date
) VALUES (
  '{{ $json.meal_name }}',
  {{ $json.calories }},
  {{ $json.protein_g || 0 }},
  {{ $json.fat_g || 0 }},
  {{ $json.carbs_g || 0 }},
  '{{ $json.log_date }}'
)
RETURNING *
SELECT * FROM users WHERE email = '{{ $json.email }}' LIMIT 1

INSERT INTO users (
  email, name, password, goal, body_type, experience, equipment, 
  training_location, sleep_target_hours, water_target_liters,
  diet_restrictions, injuries, priority_zones
) VALUES (
  '{{ $json.email }}', '{{ $json.name }}', '{{ $json.password }}', 
  '{{ $json.goal }}', '{{ $json.body_type }}', '{{ $json.experience }}', 
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.equipment) }}'::jsonb, '{{ $json.training_location }}', 
  {{ $json.sleep_target_hours }}, {{ $json.water_target_liters }},
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.diet_restrictions || []) }}'::jsonb,
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.injuries || []) }}'::jsonb,
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.priority_zones || []) }}'::jsonb
)
ON CONFLICT (email) DO NOTHING
RETURNING *

parameters.functionCode:
const u = $json;
return [{
  json: {
    email: u.email,
    name: u.name,
    password: u.password,
    goal: u.goal,
    age: u.age,
    weight_kg: u.weight,
    height_cm: u.height,
    body_fat_pct: u.body_fat,
    body_type: u.body_type,
    experience: u.experience,
    equipment: JSON.stringify(u.equipment),
    target_weight_kg: u.target_weight,
    target_body_fat_pct: u.target_body_fat,
    training_location: u.training_location,
    sleep_target_hours: u.sleep_target_hours,
    water_target_liters: u.water_target_liters,
    diet_restrictions: JSON.stringify(u.diet_restrictions),
    injuries: JSON.stringify(u.injuries),
    priority_zones: JSON.stringify(u.priority_zones),
    created_at: new Date().toISOString()
  }
}];

const body = $input.item.json.body || $input.item.json;
return [{
  json: {
    email: body.email,
    name: body.name,
    password: body.password,
    goal: body.goal || 'general_fitness',
    age: body.age,
    weight: body.weight,
    height: body.height,
    body_fat: body.body_fat,
    body_type: body.body_type || 'mesomorph',
    experience: body.experience || 'beginner',
    equipment: body.equipment || ['собственный вес'],
    target_weight: body.target_weight,
    target_body_fat: body.target_body_fat,
    training_location: body.training_location || 'gym',
    sleep_target_hours: body.sleep_target_hours || 8,
    water_target_liters: body.water_target_liters || 2.5,
    diet_restrictions: body.diet_restrictions || [],
    injuries: body.injuries || [],
    priority_zones: body.priority_zones || []
  }
}];
